title: SDTM Deep Verification Coverage Ledger Schema
description: Coverage ledger 统一 schema, P0 Pilot 收官冻结 v1.2 (2026-04-24). 一行 JSONL = 1 匹配决定; forward (PDF->MD) 和 reverse (MD->PDF) 共享结构, 通过 matched_by.direction 区分 + verdict 枚举分组.

pdf_atom_id.description: Forward 必填; reverse 若 forward-aware 继承则填对应 pdf_atom_id, 否则 null

md_atom_ids.description: 匹配的 md 原子 id 列表. 空数组 = forward MISSING 或 reverse UNSOURCED/HALLUCINATED.

similarity_score.description: 0.0 = 全无匹配; 1.0 = 字面完全同. v1.2 硬 gate: PARTIAL ≥0.50 (forward, M3 fix); SOURCED ≥0.50 (reverse, N2 fix, 除非 H2' forward-aware 继承).

discrepancy.description: 非 EXACT 时描述差异; 可含标记: [KEYWORD_MISSING: <word>] / [KEYWORD_FLAG_L2: <word>] / [INVALID_MD_ATOM_TYPE: <非 9-enum 值>]. H1 硬禁: 仅引 source_atom/candidates.verbatim 字面内容, 禁引训练数据带入 (如凭空出现的 C-code).

exclusion_reason.description: 仅 verdict=INTENTIONAL_EXCLUDE 时填; 需同步登记 intentional_exclude_whitelist.md

audited_by.description: Rule D reviewer 独立审查记录, 每次追加一条 CONFIRM/OVERRIDE/AMBIGUOUS

forward_verdict.description: Forward (PDF->MD) 9 值 (含 INTENTIONAL_EXCLUDE 管理层). v1.2 new: EDITORIAL_CORRECTION (M1' PDF typo 修正场景) + TABLE_SIMPLIFIED (v1.1 new 正式成文). 判定顺序见 P0_matcher_v1.2.md §forward enum.

reverse_verdict.description: Reverse (MD->PDF) 5 值. v1.2 new: EDITORIAL_ADDITION (md 独有元数据 'Source:' 等, 非幻觉非合成). SOURCED ≥0.50 gate (N2). H2' 硬 gate: forward-matched md_atom 强制 SOURCED 继承.

subagent_type.description: 执行该 matcher 的 subagent_type

batch_id.description: Batch 标识 (v0.3 F-4: 每 100 原子 = 1 batch); P0 Pilot 用形如 'P0_T1_forward_v1.1'

forward_aware_checked.description: v1.2 H2' 硬 gate: reverse 方向必为 true (matcher 已读 forward ledger 并依其结果); forward 方向固定 false

override_to.description: OVERRIDE 时填 reviewer 推荐的新 verdict (必 ∈ forward/reverse verdict enum)

verdict_direction_validation.description: 运行时 validator 规则: forward ledger 的 verdict 必 ∈ forward_verdict; reverse ledger 的 verdict 必 ∈ reverse_verdict. matched_by.direction 与 verdict 所在枚举必一致, 不一致即 schema error.

issue_trigger_map.description: verdict -> 自动开 Issue 触发表 (PLAN Appendix C 同步). P6 triage 批处理按此开 Issue 5+

EDITORIAL_CORRECTION.note: MD 已修正 PDF typo, 记录即可, 不开 Issue

TABLE_SIMPLIFIED.note: 只舍弃空/元数据列, 非质量问题

SYNTHESIZED.note: 作者合成 (Mermaid / 表重组 / Examples)

EDITORIAL_ADDITION.note: md 独有元数据 (Source, Last updated)

notes.forward_verdict_decision_order: MISPLACED > EXACT > EDITORIAL_CORRECTION > EQUIVALENT > TABLE_SIMPLIFIED > PARTIAL(>=0.50) > ERROR > MISSING (早匹配早返回)
notes.reverse_step_zero_H2_prime: reverse matcher 必先读 forward_ledger_snippet. forward_matched_pdf_atoms 非空时强制 verdict=SOURCED 继承 forward 结果, 不再独立判 (v1.2 H2' 硬 gate, 消 reverse/forward 矛盾 bug).
notes.heading_equivalent_threshold: HEADING 原子判 EQUIVALENT 要 token Jaccard >= 0.85 或核心限定词 (Additional/Only/Primary 等) 完整保留, 否则降 PARTIAL (v1.2 N3 fix).
notes.partial_hard_gate: PARTIAL verdict 硬 gate similarity_score >= 0.50. 低于则降 MISSING (v1.1 M3, v1.2 持续).
notes.keyword_level_1_force_downgrade: MISSING 原子 discrepancy 含 [KEYWORD_MISSING: shall|shall not|must|MUST|must not|required|is required|are required|is not permitted|is prohibited|not permitted|may not] 任一 -> P4b 聚合时强制降 CONTENT_TRUNCATED 进 gate
notes.keyword_level_2_flag: 命中 [KEYWORD_FLAG_L2: should|only|except|no longer|cannot|not allowed] 不自动降级, 但 P4b 按 >=20% 抽检
